introSection: Family Coaster was a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Andretti Thrill Park in Melbourne, Florida, USA. It opened in 2015. As of April 2024, the ride is listed for sale on used rides website Rides4U.com.
fullText:
Family Coaster was a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Andretti Thrill Park in Melbourne, Florida, USA. It opened in 2015. As of April 2024, the ride is listed for sale on used rides website Rides4U.com.



Each row sits back-to-back.
